name: 陳志強
headline: Staff Software Engineer at TechCorp | Distributed Systems
summary: Staff engineer with 12 years building distributed storage systems. Led the migration of a 50-node cluster to Kubernetes, cutting operational cost by 35%. Open-source contributor to etcd and TiKV.

experiences.title: Staff Software Engineer
bullets: Tech lead for storage platform serving 200M QPS across 50 nodes
Reduced p99 latency from 85ms to 22ms through io_uring migration
Mentor 4 engineers, 2 promoted to senior during tenure

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Designed multi-region replication for storage service, 99.999% uptime
Authored RFC for consistent hashing rewrite, adopted org-wide

experiences.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Employee #5, built initial backend stack in Go
Scaled from 100 to 500K users before acquisition
